seo.title: Mortgage Broker Manhattan NYC | Condo, Co-op & Jumbo Loans
seo.description: Manhattan mortgage broker for condos, co-ops & jumbo purchases. Refinance, Non-QM & competitive pre-approvals. Green Street Capital NMLS #2066586.

hero.heading: Mortgage Broker in Manhattan, NYC
hero.subheading: Condo, co-op, and jumbo financing for Manhattan buyers — board-ready files, multiple lenders, licensed NY broker.

intro.heading: Manhattan Buyers We Support
paragraphs: If you searched for a mortgage broker in manhattan, nyc, home loans nearby, or a mortgage broker near me in this area, Green Street Capital can help. We are a licensed mortgage broker (NMLS #2066586) offering purchase, refinance, and specialty programs through multiple lenders.

Manhattan purchases often involve higher price points, co-op boards, condo associations, and jumbo financing. Green Street Capital helps professionals, families, and investors structure loans that fit both the building’s guidelines and the lender’s overlays.
We coordinate documentation early so you can move quickly when the right unit becomes available.
bullets: Condo purchasers in established and new developments
Co-op buyers preparing for board review
Jumbo borrowers above conforming loan limits
Refinances for Manhattan owners seeking better terms
Pied-à-terre and second-home scenarios where available

sidebar.body: Experience with competitive Manhattan transactions and lender products designed for high-cost markets.

market.heading: Manhattan Market Context
paragraphs: Inventory and building-level rules can change the feasible loan set for a unit. We review property type early to avoid late-stage surprises.
Full monthly cost includes maintenance or common charges—not only principal and interest.

faqs.question: Do you finance Manhattan co-ops?
faqs.answer: Yes. We help buyers understand typical lender and board expectations for co-op financing.

faqs.question: Can I get a jumbo loan through Green Street Capital?
faqs.answer: We work with lenders that offer jumbo and high-balance products for qualified borrowers.

faqs.question: How fast can I get pre-approved?
faqs.answer: Timelines depend on how quickly complete documentation is provided. Contact a loan officer to start.

faqs.question: Who is a good mortgage broker for Manhattan condos?
faqs.answer: Green Street Capital regularly finances Manhattan condos and co-ops as a licensed NY mortgage broker (NMLS #2066586). We prepare board- and lender-ready documentation.

faqs.question: Can I get a jumbo loan in Manhattan?
faqs.answer: Yes. Many Manhattan purchases require jumbo financing. We compare jumbo guidelines for reserves, credit, and down payment.

faqs.question: Do you refinance Manhattan apartments?
faqs.answer: Yes. We evaluate rate-and-term and cash-out refinance for co-ops and condos when equity and income support it.

faqs.question: Is there a mortgage broker near me in Manhattan?
faqs.answer: We serve Manhattan buyers citywide with phone, video, and Brooklyn office meetings. Call 718-615-4545 or schedule online.

cta.heading: Plan your Manhattan purchase
cta.body: Connect with a loan officer to discuss condo, co-op, or jumbo financing options.
